---
id: test-plugin-connection
title: "Test plugin connection with provided settings"
description: "Password fields may be omitted — the plugin falls back to its saved value."

hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Test plugin connection with provided settings"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/plugins/api/plugins/{pluginId}/test"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Password fields may be omitted — the plugin falls back to its saved value.
